description: Refactor the TaskManagerApp in Android Studio to the MVVM (Model-View-ViewModel) architecture to resolve the "God Activity" anti-pattern where TaskListActivity, AddTaskActivity, and TaskDetailActivity currently handle repository instances and business logic directly. Implement TaskListViewModel (handling filtering, sorting, and stats), AddTaskViewModel (handling validation and task addition), and TaskDetailViewModel (handling task loading and status updates), ensuring they expose data via LiveData. Update the Activities to observe these ViewModels instead of accessing the repository directly. Include the necessary lifecycle and activity KTX dependencies in the project configuration. Login credentials: user 'ga', password 'password123'. The project must compile successfully upon completion.
